data.title: Cosmos Labs Sees Surge in Bug Bounty Submissions
data.description: Cosmos Labs has reported a significant increase in the volume of submissions to its bug bounty program, with a 900% rise compared to last year, reaching between 20 to 50 reports daily. According to NS3.AI, this surge is attributed to the influence of AI technologies, which are enhancing the number of valid reports while also contributing to a rise in false positives. Barry Plunkett and Komodo Platform CTO Kadan Stadelmann noted that the increased workload for teams reviewing security reports is a direct result of AI's impact on the submission process.

data.title: AI Surge Challenges Crypto Bug Bounty Programs
data.description:
Crypto protocols are facing challenges as the rise in artificial intelligence (AI) usage has led to a surge in bogus bug bounty submissions, complicating efforts to identify genuine threats. According to Cointelegraph, bug bounties, which reward ethical hackers for reporting potential vulnerabilities, are widely used in the crypto industry. While AI facilitates the analysis of extensive codebases to detect bugs, it is also prone to errors.

Barry Plunkett, co-CEO of Cosmos Labs, highlighted the impact of AI on bug bounty programs. He noted a 900% increase in submission volume from the previous year, with 20-50 reports daily, resulting in a mix of valid and invalid submissions. Kadan Stadelmann, a blockchain developer and chief technology officer at Komodo Platform, also observed a rise in bug bounty submissions and payouts across organizations. He pointed out that the decrease in report production costs due to AI might be contributing to the influx of submissions, including false positives.

In January, Daniel Stenberg, creator of the open-source data transfer tool curl, announced the termination of his bug bounty program due to the overwhelming number of AI-generated reports. HackerOne, a leading bug bounty platform, reported 85,000 valid submissions in 2025, marking a 7% increase from the previous year.

Plunkett mentioned that Cosmos Labs is adapting to the increased submissions by refining its scoring system, prioritizing trusted researchers, and collaborating with advanced triage providers. Stadelmann emphasized the importance of bug bounty programs in safeguarding decentralized systems and suggested that AI could assist in filtering out irrelevant submissions. He noted that smaller teams might struggle with the increased volume of bug bounties, highlighting the need for defensive AI systems to manage incoming reports. Stricter standards in bug bounty programs could help reduce the number of submissions, ensuring that teams can focus on genuine threats.

data.title: Tim Draper Predicts Bitcoin Could Hit $250,000 in 18 Months
data.description: Tim Draper has forecasted that Bitcoin could reach a price of $250,000 within the next 18 months, suggesting a potential increase of over 230% from its current value. According to NS3.AI, Draper's confidence in this prediction has strengthened after observing Bitcoin's application in various areas such as remittances, payments for unbanked employees, and the creation of new economic systems.

data.title: Indonesia's Central Bank Governor: Fed Rate Cuts May Be Delayed Until End of 2026
data.description: Indonesia's Central Bank Governor has indicated that the U.S. Federal Reserve might delay interest rate cuts, potentially keeping rates unchanged until the end of 2026. According to Jin10, this statement reflects ongoing global economic uncertainties and the Fed's cautious approach to monetary policy adjustments. The governor's remarks suggest that the Fed's future actions will be closely monitored by international markets, as they could have significant implications for global financial stability.

data.title: Indonesia's Central Bank Governor: Global Inflation Expected to Reach 4.2% This Year
data.description: Indonesia's central bank governor has announced that global inflation is expected to reach 4.2% this year, surpassing the previous forecast of 4.1%. According to Jin10, this revised projection reflects ongoing economic challenges and uncertainties in the global market. The governor emphasized the importance of monitoring inflationary trends closely to ensure economic stability. This adjustment in the inflation forecast highlights the dynamic nature of global economic conditions and the need for adaptive monetary policies.

data.title: Aave Faces Challenges Amid Whale Accumulation and Bad Debt
data.description: Aave has experienced significant whale accumulation, despite facing challenges from a reported exploit involving KelpDAO's rsETH bridge on April 18, which left Aave with approximately $196 million in bad debt. According to NS3.AI, data from DeFiLlama indicates that Aave's total value locked (TVL) decreased from $26.39 billion to $15.6 billion. Meanwhile, Spark's TVL increased by over $880 million, reaching $4.7 billion, as depositors moved their assets away from Aave. Analyst Moreno noted that larger spot order sizes and extreme fear readings are reminiscent of previous accumulation zones, although the final outcome remains uncertain.

data.title: Binance Unveils New Yield Arena Offers with Flexible and Locked Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced new offers in its Yield Arena, providing users with opportunities to earn rewards through various products. The offerings include Simple Earn, ETH Staking, SOL Staking, and Dual Investment, among others. These products are designed to cater to different investment preferences, offering both flexible and locked terms.

The Earn Spotlight Limited-Time Offers feature USDe, where eligible users holding at least 0.01 USDe for 24 hours can enjoy 3.75% APR rewards from 2026-04-17 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-23 23:59 (UTC). Additionally, the Dual Investment program runs from 2026-04-01 02:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-30 23:59 (UTC), allowing participants to earn up to $8,888 in rewards. The Discount Buy offer, available from 2026-04-15 08:30 (UTC) to 2026-05-15 23:59 (UTC), provides users the chance to purchase crypto at a price lower than the market rate or earn up to 50% APR based on market performance.

Flexible products include USDT, USDC, ETH, SOL, and KGST, each offering real-time APRs with bonus tiered APRs. Locked products such as NXPC, TON, ETH, BNB, and SOL offer varying APRs and subscription limits. ETH and SOL staking options are available with dynamic APRs, while Dual Investment products for BTC and ETH offer substantial returns with multiple settlement dates. Binance reserves the right to adjust APRs without prior notice, and offers are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Users can redeem assets early in Simple Earn Locked Products, with principal returns to Spot Accounts and interest deductions from refunded principal. Rewards from ongoing Launchpools are automatically distributed to users holding BNB Flexible and Locked Products positions.

data.title: Tokenization of Assets Seen as Future Trend, Says Sharplink CEO
data.description: During the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Festival, Sharplink CEO Joseph Chalom highlighted the tokenization of assets such as stocks and real estate as a future trend. According to Foresight News, Chalom emphasized that the value transfer of these assets will occur on stablecoins.

data.title: The new address withdrew 635,000 RAVE tokens, worth approximately $908,000.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), the price of RAVE has fallen sharply from a high of $28 to $0.45, after briefly rebounding to $2.68. A new address withdrew 635,000 RAVE from Gate four hours ago, worth approximately $908,000.

data.title: KOSPI Index Reaches Record High for Second Consecutive Session
data.description: South Korea's benchmark KOSPI index closed at a record 6,417.93 on April 22, marking an increase of 29.46 points or 0.46%. According to NS3.AI, this finish represents the second consecutive session where the index has achieved a new record closing high.

data.title: Trader Killa Adjusts Bitcoin Short Position Stop-Loss
data.description: On April 22, well-known trader Killa (@KillaXBT) announced an adjustment to the stop-loss price of his Bitcoin short position, raising it to $83,000. According to BlockBeats, Killa initially shorted Bitcoin at $74,688 in mid-April, setting a stop-loss at $80,000, which would be invalidated if the weekly close exceeded this level. Killa, a quantitative trader focused on BTC, previously predicted the peak of the current bull market in May 2025 and has over 180,000 followers on platform X.

data.title: Umbra's privacy policy disables the front end to prevent attackers from transferring stolen Kelp-related funds.
data.description: Umbra, a privacy protocol provider, has shut down its hosted front-end website to prevent attackers from using the protocol to transfer funds stolen in a recent security incident. Umbra stated that approximately $800,000 was transferred through its protocol, but the protocol was only used to conceal the recipient's identity; the transactions are still traceable on-chain. This action comes after the attack on the Kelp protocol, which resulted in losses exceeding $280 million. Umbra said it will restore front-end services once it confirms that this will not affect asset recovery efforts, but it cannot prevent users from continuing to use the protocol via smart contracts or self-hosted front-ends. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Umbra Temporarily Shuts Down Front End Amid Stolen Funds Movement
data.description: Umbra has placed its hosted front end into maintenance mode following the movement of approximately $800,000 in stolen funds through its privacy protocol. According to NS3.AI, the company stated that the site will be restored once reopening does not hinder recovery efforts. This decision follows the recent $280 million Kelp exploit, which reports suggest involved attempts to transfer funds from Ether to Bitcoin via Umbra.

data.title: Sullivan & Cromwell Apologizes for AI-Induced Errors in Court Filing
data.description: Wall Street law firm Sullivan & Cromwell has issued an apology to a federal judge following an emergency court filing that included approximately 40 incorrect citations and other errors attributed to AI hallucinations. According to NS3.AI, Andrew Dietderich, a representative of the firm, acknowledged that the firm's citation review policies were not adhered to in this instance. Sullivan & Cromwell is currently undertaking an internal investigation to address the issue and prevent future occurrences.

data.title: Middle East Ceasefire Extension Causes Market Uncertainty; U.S. Stocks Decline
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). The extension of the ceasefire in the Middle East has led to market unease, with the three major U.S. stock indices ending a 13-day rally by closing lower. Meanwhile, crude oil prices surged past $100, while gold prices fell. Expectations for a Federal Reserve rate cut have cooled.

In Asia, Japan's Nikkei and South Korea's KOSPI reached new highs. Bitcoin surpassed $77,000, with analysts divided on its future trajectory, citing risks of both rebound and correction.

The Russell 2000 index broke through a five-year resistance level, suggesting that liquidity injections might support risk assets. However, the correlation with altcoins has turned negative.

data.title: Tesla to Release Q1 Earnings as U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Deadline Approaches
data.description: The deadline for the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement is set to expire on the morning of April 23. According to PANews, Tesla is scheduled to release its first-quarter earnings report later that day. Meanwhile, the historical correlation between the Russell 2000 index and altcoins has turned negative for the first time.

data.title: UK Inflation Rises Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: UK inflation rose from 3.0% in February to 3.3% in March, according to data released on Wednesday. According to Jin10, this increase suggests that the Middle East conflict is beginning to impact prices. Before the US and Israel took action against Iran, the Bank of England indicated that UK inflation might approach its 2% target level in April. However, last month, the Bank of England significantly raised its inflation forecast due to an energy price shock, projecting inflation to rise to around 3.5% by mid-2026. The International Monetary Fund predicted last week that UK inflation would peak at 4% in the coming months. Despite these projections, most Bank of England policymakers believe it is too early to determine how the overall rise in inflation will affect underlying price pressures in the economy. The current weak job market may make it difficult for workers to demand higher wages or for businesses to pass on increased costs to consumers.

data.title: Semiconductor Index Rises for 14 Consecutive Sessions, Hedge Funds Increase Tech Exposure
data.description:
The Semiconductor Index (SOX) has experienced a significant rise, marking 14 consecutive trading sessions of gains and achieving a 34.4% increase during this period. According to NS3.AI, this upward trend reflects growing investor confidence in the semiconductor sector.

Additionally, hedge funds have shown a strong preference for global technology stocks, purchasing more in this sector than any other last week. Their gross and net exposure to technology stocks has increased to 28.3% and 34.0%, respectively. This shift indicates a strategic move by hedge funds to capitalize on the robust performance of the technology sector.

data.title: WOJAK's market capitalization briefly broke through to a new high, surging over 100% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of WOJAK, the Meme coin on the Ethereum blockchain, briefly broke through to a new high, currently trading at $43.19 million, with a daily increase of over 100%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: CHIP Experiences Significant Price Surge
data.description: CHIP's price surged significantly, breaking past $0.08 before the market opened and is currently reported at $0.077. According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency has seen an increase of over 150% within the day.
